name: Delicious Dirt
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the sugar-free Devil's Food cake mix according to package directions and allow it to cool completely.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine the low-fat cream cheese (or Neufchatel), margarine, skim milk, and chocolate pudding packets until smooth and thickened.
3. Fold in the prepared sugar-free whipped topping into the mixture.
4. Crush the sugar-free dark brown cookies into fine crumbs.
